notes: Phase 5 (Sunwell Plateau) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Demonology Warlock Dps gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (drafted ahead of the TBC Anniversary realm reaching this content, same approach as p3/p4). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

enchants.source: Icy Veins TBC Classic enchant guide (full ranked alternatives on the guide page)

gems.name: Chaotic Skyfire Diamond (+15 crit rating, +3% crit damage)
Runed Living Ruby (+8 spell damage, pre-T6) — Runed Crimson Spinel from Phase 3 onward
Potent Pyrestone (+4 spell damage / +4 crit, Phase 3 & 4) — Reckless Pyrestone in Phase 5; Veiled Noble Topaz/Pyrestone if short on hit
any blue gem sufficient to activate the meta — minimize blue sockets otherwise
